content.p: The Secretary shall require at least 50 percent of the costs directly and specifically related to any project under this part to be from non-Federal sources. Such share may be in the form of cash, personnel, services, equipment, and other resources.

subsection.heading: Reduction
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary may reduce the amount of costs required to be provided by non-Federal sources under subsection (a) if the Secretary determines that the reduction is necessary and appropriate—

paragraph.content: considering the technological risks involved in the project; and
in order to meet the objectives of this part.
